subject: A pig or boar being roasted on a skewer over a bonfire, held by an enormous hand
description: An enormous hand extends from the upper right corner, gripping a long ornate skewer or spit. Impaled on the skewer is a pig or boar carcass, positioned over a roaring fire with large orange and yellow flames filling the lower half of the image. Glowing embers and sparks drift upward. The background is deep blue, likely night. The scale of the hand relative to the animal emphasizes a giant's perspective. No face or body beyond the hand is visible.
foreground: Pig/boar on skewer; roaring bonfire flames; giant hand
emotion: Brutal and indifferent; the scale emphasizes power imbalance
